page: Vultr vc2-1c-0.5gb is an entry-level virtual machine belonging to the Cloud Compute family. It features a single shared vCPU based on the Intel x86_64 architecture, configured with one physical core and one thread. The instance is equipped with 0.5 GB of system memory, providing a low-density resource profile designed for basic computing needs.

Local storage is bundled with the instance, consisting of a 10 GB NVMe SSD. This solid-state storage provides fast read and write speeds relative to traditional hard drives, though the capacity is limited. The server also includes one complimentary public IPv4 address for external connectivity. There are no dedicated GPU resources available on this instance.

Because the CPU allocation is shared and lacks advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512, AES cryptography, or deep learning boost flags, this server is designed for lightweight workloads. The minimal memory footprint of 0.5 GB makes it highly cost-efficient for basic utility tasks but unsuitable for memory-intensive applications. Appropriate workloads include simple web serving, lightweight scripting, microservices, development sandboxes, and basic network utilities that do not require sustained high CPU performance.
description: Vultr vc2-1c-0.5gb is an entry-level virtual machine within the Cloud Compute family, designed for lightweight utility workloads. It features a single shared Intel x86_64 vCPU with one physical core and one thread, paired with 0.5 GB of system memory. Local storage is provided via a bundled 10 GB NVMe SSD, and the instance includes one complimentary public IPv4 address. Due to its shared CPU architecture and lack of advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 or AES hardware acceleration, this server is optimized for budget-conscious, low-intensity tasks rather than high-performance computing. It represents a highly cost-efficient option for running basic scripts, microservices, small development environments, or simple static web servers where resource demands are minimal and predictable.

tagline: A budget-friendly virtual server featuring a shared single-core processor and fast NVMe storage for lightweight utility workloads and development sandboxes.

10 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
One complimentary public IPv4 address included
Best suited for lightweight scripting, microservices, and static web hosting
